name: MiniMax-Text-01
metaDescription: MiniMax-Text-01 (MiniMax), released 2025-01-15 — part of the MiniMax-01 (Text-01) line. Open-source 456B-total / 45.9B-active hybrid MoE with lightning + softm…
overview: MiniMax-Text-01 is a large language model from MiniMax, part of the MiniMax-01 (Text-01) line. Released 2025-01-15. Foundation LLM line pioneering lightning (linear) attention at scale for extreme context lengths.
What's notable in this version: Open-source 456B-total / 45.9B-active hybrid MoE with lightning + softmax attention; 1M-token training context, extrapolates to 4M at inference.
